code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:8080/api'});export const getAllProducts=()=>API.get('/products');export const getProductsBySector=sector=>API.get("/products/sector/".concat(sector));export const createProduct=data=>API.post('/products',data);export const updateProduct=(id,data)=>API.put("/products/".concat(id),data);export const deleteProduct=id=>API.delete("/products/".concat(id));
